name: Club Cheesecake with Zwieback Crumb Crust
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Whipping cream OR evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush Zwieback and roll to fine crumbs.
2. Combine half of the crumbs with 1/2 cup sugar, 1/8 teaspoon salt, and melted butter. Mix until well blended.
3. Press mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch cake pan with removable bottom. Reserve the rest of the crumbs for topping the cake.
4. Cover the crust with waxed paper and refrigerate.
5. To make the filling, combine 1 cup sugar and whipping cream or evaporated milk. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
6. Add cottage cheese, 1/4 teaspoon salt, well-beaten egg yolks, sifted flour, vanilla, and grated lemon peel to the mixture. Beat thoroughly until well blended and smooth.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the cheese mixture.
8. Turn the batter onto the chilled Zwieback Crumb Crust and sprinkle with reserved crumbs.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
10. Let cake cool in pan.
